summary: Phase 3 Safety Pipeline Testing Complete - Semantic Detection (3B), Rewrite Quality (3C), Safety Telemetry (3D), and Frontend Soft Warning UX (3E). All 20 backend API tests passed. 54/54 golden test suite tests passed. Frontend safety toast interceptor verified in code.

issues: Theme and Moral fields are dropdowns with predefined options, not free-form text input. This is actually a good design choice that prevents users from entering copyrighted content directly through the UI.

critical_code_review_comments: story-hook-generator is template-based and doesn't accept free-form text input (topic field is not in the request model). Safety checks are applied to genre, character_type, and setting fields only.
Frontend api.js interceptor correctly shows toast when _safety_meta.was_rewritten is true in response.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Safety Pipeline fully tested. All semantic detection, fuzzy alias detection, rewrite quality, and telemetry features working correctly. The safety-insights endpoint returns top_rewritten_terms, top_ip_clusters, high_risk_routes, output_leaks_by_feature, and detection_types. Frontend safety toast is wired via api.js interceptor using sonner library. Note: story-hook-generator is template-based and doesn't accept free-form text - use bedtime-story-builder for testing free-form text safety.

phase_3b_semantic_detection.description: Semantic detection catches indirect IP references
tested_patterns: wizard boy with lightning scar → Harry Potter
ice princess with magical powers → Frozen
fuzzy_alias_detection: h a r r y p o t t e r → Harry Potter
phase_3b_semantic_detection.false_positive_guard: Clean prompts like 'A brave knight saves a village' and 'An astronaut explores a distant planet' are NOT flagged

phase_3c_rewrite_quality.description: Rewrites are narrative-rich (5+ words) and don't contain original IP names

example_rewrites.Harry Potter: a determined young mage discovering his powers in a hidden academy
example_rewrites.Spider-Man: a nimble acrobatic vigilante who patrols city rooftops

endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/metrics/safety-insights: Returns top_rewritten_terms, top_ip_clusters, high_risk_routes, output_leaks_by_feature, detection_types
endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/metrics/safety-overview: Returns input_safety counts (allowed, rewritten, blocked), by_feature breakdown, output_validation stats
endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/metrics/safety-events: Returns list of recent safety events with filtering by decision (ALLOW/REWRITE/BLOCK)

phase_3e_frontend_soft_warning.description: POST to generation endpoint with copyrighted content returns _safety_meta.was_rewritten=true
phase_3e_frontend_soft_warning.implementation: api.js interceptor shows toast.info() when _safety_meta.was_rewritten is true
phase_3e_frontend_soft_warning.toast_message: We adjusted a few words to keep your content original and generation-ready.

fail_closed_dangerous_content.description: Genuinely dangerous content is properly BLOCKED with 400 status
tested_patterns: how to make a bomb with household chemicals tutorial guide → BLOCKED

regression_safety_events.description: Existing safety-events list endpoint still works with filtering

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/bedtime-story-builder/generate: PASS - Obfuscated names detected and rewritten
PASS - Clean prompts pass without rewrite
